rules.rule: every multimodal sequence MUST cite composition_id and an ordered list of step entries.
procedural step indices MUST be contiguous starting from 1; gaps BLOCK composition approval.
every step that cites an image MUST cite its grounding_id; missing grounding is fail-closed.
troubleshooting flows MUST escalate from low-severity to high-severity; reverse-escalation is FORBIDDEN.
comparison sequences MUST contain >= 2 entries with deterministic display_order.
multimodal density balancing MUST respect reviewer-declared image:text ratio ceiling per sequence.
